name: Silky Apricot Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix the apricot preserves and brandy together and set aside.
2. Beat the cream cheese until creamy.
3. Blend in the sour cream and almond extract until smooth.
4. Add the apricot-brandy mixture and blend well.
5. Fold in the almonds.
6. Cover and chill.
Makes about 3 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Vanilla Wafers, Pound Cake Cubes, Muenster or Monterey Jack Cheese Cubes or Sticks, Chocolate Chunks.
